current_wind.description: Moderate NNW wind with significant crosswind from the left.

wind_info.description: Slight tailwind with a crosswind component from the right.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Gentle hyzer to leverage the tailwind and allow a smooth turnover for distance. Keep it clean.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A touch of anhyzer to push it straight, or a flat release with a stable disc to fight any left-to-right drift.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A flat release or slight hyzer, letting the wind push it gently right. Avoid forcing anhyzer into the crosswind.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with an overstable disc to fight the drift and get a controlled fade.

wind_info.description: Slight tailwind with a crosswind component from the right.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Gentle hyzer to leverage the tailwind and allow a smooth turnover for distance. Keep it clean.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A touch of anhyzer to push it straight, or a flat release with a stable disc to fight any left-to-right drift.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A flat release or slight hyzer, letting the wind push it gently right. Avoid forcing anhyzer into the crosswind.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with an overstable disc to fight the drift and get a controlled fade.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Utilize the tailwind with an understable driver on a hyzer flip for maximum distance. Keep the angle consistent.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A controlled flat release or slight hyzer to keep it straight down the fairway. Watch for unexpected leftward drift.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A smooth hyzer release to get a controlled flight. The tailwind will help carry it further, so don't overpower.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A slight anhyzer angle to help it turn and glide. The tailwind will assist in its flight.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the left with some headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A strong hyzer is required to fight the left crosswind and a slight headwind. Expect it to hold the hyzer line.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A flat release or slight hyzer to get it down the fairway. The wind will want to push it left, so aim slightly right of the target.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: This angle can be tricky; aim for a straight shot or slight anhyzer to counter the leftward push. Keep it low.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with an understable disc to fight the strong left drift and headwind. Aim for a gentle fade right.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the left with a noticeable headwind.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A strong hyzer is required to fight the left crosswind and headwind. Expect it to hold the hyzer line.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A flat release or slight hyzer to get it down the fairway. The wind will want to push it left, so aim slightly right of the target.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: This angle can be tricky; aim for a straight shot or slight anhyzer to counter the leftward push. Keep it low.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with an understable disc to fight the strong left drift and headwind. Aim for a gentle fade right.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Commit to a strong hyzer. This wind will push any flat or anhyzer shot far left. Need maximum stability to fight it.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Focus on a clean release and aim significantly right. A slight hyzer might help it hold its line before fading back.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Try a flat release, or a very subtle anhyzer, to utilize the wind's push and try to achieve a straight flight or gentle right fade.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with an understable disc to fight the severe left drift. A controlled flex shot could also work if you have the distance.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the right, pushing shots towards the left fairway.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: A controlled hyzer or flat release will work well here. The wind will help the disc fade left, so aim accordingly. Avoid anhyzer.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: A clean, straight release with an overstable disc will fight the right crosswind and fade back nicely. Aim for the right side of the fairway.

bh.shot_strategy: BH: Aim for a straight shot or slight anhyzer. The wind will push it left, which is favorable for LHBH. Keep it low to prevent cut-rolling.

fh.shot_strategy: FH: Hyzer flip with a stable disc to counter the wind's push and get a controlled fade to the left.
